subject: refactor(theme): replace manual UI patterns with DaisyUI component classes
body:
Replace 57+ manually-styled UI elements with DaisyUI component classes:

- Inputs/selects/textareas (23 instances): Manual bg-base-100 border
  border-base-300 → DaisyUI input input-bordered / select select-bordered
  / textarea textarea-bordered
- Badges (8 instances): Manual rounded-full px py → DaisyUI badge
  badge-primary badge-soft badge-sm. Deleted .label-badge from App.css
- Progress bars (5 full-width instances): Manual div-in-div → DaisyUI
  <progress> element. Kept small inline score bars as manual divs
- Alerts (5 instances): Manual bg-error/10 border → DaisyUI alert
  alert-error / alert-warning alert-soft
- Checkboxes (1): accent-primary → checkbox checkbox-primary checkbox-sm
- Range slider (1): accent-primary → range range-primary range-sm
- Shared CSS: .modal-cancel → btn btn-ghost, .modal-actions → flex gap
  mt-4, .app-alpha-badge → badge badge-warning badge-xs. Deleted from
  App.css

App.css reduced from 298 to ~230 lines.
TimelineView.css checkbox accent-color rule removed (DaisyUI handles).

Tags: theme, daisyui, components, forms, badges, progress, alerts
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor
